overview: A professional, elegant company intranet for a sheet-metal press component manufacturer. Includes 13 department portals (Accounts, Finance, HR, IT, Maintenance, NPD, PPC, Production, Purchase, Quality, RM-Purchase, Stores, Tool-Room) with manufacturing-specific dashboards, KPI metrics, equipment tracking, and a modernized design system.
features: Production dashboard with machine status, shift schedules, and output metrics
Quality dashboard with defect trends, SPC charts, and inspection checkpoints
Maintenance dashboard with equipment schedule, downtime alerts, and TPM calendar
Stores and Tool-Room inventory with stock levels and tool checkout logs
Purchase and RM-Purchase with PO status, vendor list, and lead times
HR attendance summary, leave approvals, and training calendar
Finance and Accounts expense approvals and budget tracking
NPD project status, design reviews, and BOM management
IT support tickets, system uptime, and asset inventory
Critical alert panel for production issues, maintenance, and quality holds
Dark mode toggle with persistent preference
Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile
Announcements and news feed per department
